title: A stain proof gardening container
abstract: A gardening container having a cap brace including a plurality of grooves, each groove receiving a top edge of a left side panel, right side panel or back panel, a front panel attached to the left side panel including a handle, a floor panel including a well and a plurality of grooves, each groove receiving a bottom edge of the left side panel member, right side panel member or back panel member, a gardening collection receptacle for receiving at least one gardening component, the gardening collection receptacle including an elastic headband located at its top region for installing the gardening collection receptacle, and a drainage aperture for draining excess materials from the gardening collection receptacle and a drainage collection repository for receiving the excess materials drained from the gardening collection receptacle. The drainage collection repository including a handle, and wherein the drainage collection repository is positioned within the well in the floor panel.
claims: Claims CLAIMS What is claimed is: 1. A stain-proof gardening container comprising: a cap brace including a plurality of grooves, each groove for receiving a top edge of a corresponding one of vertically oriented left side panel member, right side panel member and back panel member; a front panel member including a handle, the front panel member is fixedly attached to the left side panel member, and the handle allows the movement of the front panel member to an open or closed position; a floor panel including a well and a plurality of grooves, each groove for receiving a bottom edge from one of a corresponding vertically oriented left side panel member, right side panel member and back panel member; a housing frame, wherein the housing frame is formed by the cap brace, left side panel member, right side panel member, back panel member, front panel member and floor panel, the housing frame including an interior cavity; a gardening collection receptacle for receiving and storing at least one gardening component, the gardening collection receptacle including an elastic headband located at a top region of the gardening collection receptacle for installing the gardening collection receptacle in the interior cavity of the housing unit and a drainage aperture located at a bottom region of the gardening collection receptacle for draining excess materials from the gardening collection receptacle; and a drainage collection repository for receiving the excess materials drained from the gardening collection receptacle, the drainage collection repository including a handle for removing the drainage collection repository from the housing unit, and wherein the drainage collection repository is positioned within the well in the floor panel. 2. The container of claim 1, wherein the excess materials drained from the gardening collection receptacle includes water. 3. The container of claim 1, wherein the elastic headband attaches to the housing unit between each groove in the cap brace and each grooveâs received top edge from one of a corresponding vertically oriented left side panel member, right side panel member and back panel member. 4. The container of claim 1 , wherein the cap brace includes an aperture for receiving therethrough the at least one gardening component. 5. The container of claim 1, wherein the cap brace includes an indicator light for notification of time to empty the drainage collection repository. 6. The container of claim 1, wherein the housing unit includes a battery operated switching arm with an attached floating member. 7. The container of claim 6, wherein the attached floating member is positioned inside the drainage collection repository. 8. The container of claim 7, wherein the floating member responds to water depth changes in the drainage collection repository. 9. The container of claim 8, wherein the switching arm activates the indicator light in the cap brace when the floating member rises to a pre-set point within the drainage collection repository. 10. The container of claim 1 , wherein the front panel member provides a user access to the interior cavity of the housing unit. 11. The container of claim 1 , wherein the gardening component includes at least one or more from the group consisting of a plant, potting soil, and water. 12. The container of claim 1, wherein the drainage aperture is located at the center of the bottom of the gardening collection receptacle. 13. The container of claim 1, wherein the positioning of the drainage collection repository is aligned with the drainage aperture. 14. The container of claim 1, wherein the gardening collection receptacle is a construction strength plastic bag. 15. The container of claim 14, wherein the plastic bag is transparent. 16. The container of claim 15, wherein the transparent plastic bag allows a user to determine upon visual inspection whether a plant needs to be replanted. 17. The container of claim 1, further comprising one or more wheels for moving the container. 18. The container of claim 1, further comprising a mesh screen attached to the cap brace. 19. The container of claim 18, wherein a plant that is planted in a pot sits on top of the mesh screen.
